properties.name: Kingdom of Olympus
properties.summary: Home of the twelve gods, ruled from the sacred peak where Zeus holds court above the clouds.

properties.name: Sunken Realm of Atlantis
properties.summary: A once-great island kingdom swallowed by the sea in a single night, its towers said to still glow faintly beneath the waves.

properties.name: Dominion of the Pharaoh Gods
properties.summary: A desert kingdom ruled in the name of Ra, Osiris, and Anubis, where the dead are guided to the afterlife along the river.

properties.name: Realm of Asgard
properties.summary: Hall of the Norse gods, joined to the mortal world by a bridge of fire and color that only the worthy may cross.

properties.name: Realm of Indra — Vedic India
properties.summary: The sacred land of the Vedic gods, where Indra hurls lightning from the heavens and the cosmic serpent Vritra guards the rivers.

properties.name: Empire of Ahura Mazda — Persia
properties.summary: The ancient Persian empire blessed by the god of light, Ahura Mazda, in eternal struggle against the dark forces of Ahriman.

properties.name: Middle Kingdom of the Dragon Emperor
properties.summary: The celestial empire ruled under the Mandate of Heaven, where dragon kings command the rivers and the Jade Emperor presides over all gods.

properties.name: Realm of Izanagi — Land of the Rising Sun
properties.summary: The island chain born when Izanagi and Izanami dipped their jeweled spear into the sea, home to eight million kami spirits.

properties.name: Sacred Lands of the Maya
properties.summary: A jungle empire built on the blood of kings and the movements of stars, where the Hero Twins descended into Xibalba and outwitted the lords of death.

properties.name: Tawantinsuyu — Inca Empire
properties.summary: The empire of the Sons of the Sun, stretching along the spine of the world, where Inti the sun god and Pachamama the earth mother are honored.

properties.name: Spirit World of the Great Plains
properties.summary: The sacred hunting grounds watched over by Wakan Tanka, the Great Spirit of the Lakota, where the buffalo are the gift of the sky and the earth speaks in thunder.
